mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role_type = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT learner_status.status AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT u.id AS user_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ucp.status = 2 THEN c.id END) = COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) THEN 2 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ucp.status IN (1, 2) THEN c.id END) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS status FROM user u LEFT JOIN course_department cd ON cd.department_id = u.dept_id LEFT JOIN course c ON c.id = cd.course_id AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN user_course_progress ucp ON ucp.user_id = u.id AND ucp.course_id = c.id WHERE u.role_type = 1 AND u.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY u.id ) learner_status GROUP BY learner_status.status

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(periods.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS period, DATE_FORMAT(periods.month_start, '%c月') AS label, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.updated_at >= periods.month_start AND ucp.updated_at < periods.month_end ) AS learnerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.status = 2 AND ucp.completed_at >= periods.month_start AND ucp.completed_at < periods.month_end ) AS completedCourseCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS month_start, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq MONTH), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS month_end FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 ) seq_tbl WHERE DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq MONTH) <= #{endDate} ) periods ORDER BY periods.month_start

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(periods.day_start, '%Y-%m-%d') AS period, DATE_FORMAT(periods.day_start, '%m-%d') AS label, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.updated_at >= periods.day_start AND ucp.updated_at < periods.day_end ) AS learnerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.status = 2 AND ucp.completed_at >= periods.day_start AND ucp.completed_at < periods.day_end ) AS completedCourseCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) AS day_start, DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL (seq + 1) DAY) AS day_end FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) seq_tbl WHERE DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) < #{endDate} ) periods ORDER BY periods.day_start

SELECT periods.week_start AS period, CONCAT('第', periods.week_index, '周') AS label, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.updated_at >= periods.week_start AND ucp.updated_at < periods.week_end ) AS learnerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.status = 2 AND ucp.completed_at >= periods.week_start AND ucp.completed_at < periods.week_end ) AS completedCourseCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq * 7 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AS week_start, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL (seq + 1) * 7 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AS week_end, seq + 1 AS week_index FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14 UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19 UNION SELECT 20 UNION SELECT 21 UNION SELECT 22 UNION SELECT 23 UNION SELECT 24 UNION SELECT 25 ) seq_tbl WHERE DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq * 7 DAY) <= #{endDate} ) periods ORDER BY periods.week_start

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(periods.month_start, '%c月') AS label, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.course_id = #{courseId} AND ucp.created_at < periods.month_end ) AS learnerCount, (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp2.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp2 WHERE ucp2.course_id = #{courseId} AND ucp2.created_at < periods.month_end) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp3.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp3 WHERE ucp3.course_id = #{courseId} AND ucp3.status = 2 AND ucp3.completed_at < periods.month_end) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp4.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp4 WHERE ucp4.course_id = #{courseId} AND ucp4.created_at < periods.month_end) , 1) END ) AS completionRate FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS month_start, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq MONTH), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS month_end FROM ( SELECT 5 AS seq UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 0 ) seq_tbl ) periods ORDER BY periods.month_start

SELECT CASE WHEN #{granularity} = 'DAY' THEN DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(ucp.started_at, ucp.created_at), '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN #{granularity} = 'WEEK' THEN DATE_FORMAT( DATE_SUB( DATE(COALESCE(ucp.started_at, ucp.created_at)), INTERVAL MOD( DATEDIFF(DATE(COALESCE(ucp.started_at, ucp.created_at)), #{startDate}), 7 ) DAY ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(ucp.started_at, ucp.created_at), '%Y-%m-01') END AS periodStart, COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) AS learnerCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ucp.status = 2 THEN ucp.user_id END) AS completedLearnerCount FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.course_id = #{courseId} AND COALESCE(ucp.started_at, ucp.created_at) >= #{startDate} AND COALESCE(ucp.started_at, ucp.created_at) < #{endDate} GROUP BY periodStart ORDER BY periodStart

SELECT d.id AS departmentId, d.name AS departmentName, COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) AS learnerCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ucp.status = 2 THEN ucp.user_id END) AS completedLearnerCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ucp.status = 2 THEN ucp.user_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id), 1) END AS completionRate FROM department d LEFT JOIN user u ON u.dept_id = d.id AND u.role_type = 1 AND u.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN user_course_progress ucp ON ucp.user_id = u.id GROUP BY d.id, d.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) > 0 ORDER BY completionRate DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT total_courses FROM course_stat_snapshot WHERE stat_date <= #{statDate} ORDER BY stat_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role_type = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at < #{beforeDate}

SELECT CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'), '-W', LPAD(weeks.week_index, 2, '0')) AS period, CONCAT('第', weeks.week_index, '周') AS label, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.updated_at >= weeks.week_start AND ucp.updated_at < weeks.week_end ) AS learnerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.status = 2 AND ucp.completed_at >= weeks.week_start AND ucp.completed_at < weeks.week_end ) AS completedCourseCount FROM ( SELECT seq + 1 AS week_index, DATE_FORMAT( DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(MAKEDATE(#{year}, 1), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL #{month} - 1 MONTH) + INTERVAL seq * 7 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS week_start, DATE_FORMAT( LEAST( DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(MAKEDATE(#{year}, 1), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL #{month} - 1 MONTH) + INTERVAL (seq + 1) * 7 DAY, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(MAKEDATE(#{year}, 1), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL #{month} MONTH) ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS week_end FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 ) seq_tbl WHERE DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(MAKEDATE(#{year}, 1), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL #{month} - 1 MONTH) + INTERVAL seq * 7 DAY < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(MAKEDATE(#{year}, 1), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL #{month} MONTH) ) weeks WHERE weeks.week_start < weeks.week_end ORDER BY weeks.week_start

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(days.day_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS period, DATE_FORMAT(days.day_date, '%c月%e日') AS label, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ucp.user_id) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.updated_at >= days.day_date AND ucp.updated_at < days.next_day ) AS learnerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_course_progress ucp WHERE ucp.status = 2 AND ucp.completed_at >= days.day_date AND ucp.completed_at < days.next_day ) AS completedCourseCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AS day_date, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq + 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AS next_day FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) seq_tbl WHERE DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) < #{endDate} ) days ORDER BY days.day_date
